nasb.text: “Son of man, what is this proverb you people have concerning the land of Israel, saying, ‘The days are long and every vision fails’?

esv.text: “Son of man, what is this proverb that you have about the land of Israel, saying, ‘The days grow long, and every vision comes to nothing’?

cnv.text: “人子啊！你們在以色列地怎麼有這一句俗語說：‘日子一天一天過去，所有異象都落空了’呢？

ccb.text: “人子啊，你们以色列有一句俗语，‘光阴流逝，异象都落空。’
